Package org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic.assertion

Class FluentResponseHeaderAssertion<R>

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.Assertion
org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentAssertion<R>
org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentObjectAssertion<String,R>
org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentStringAssertion<R>
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic.assertion.FluentResponseHeaderAssertion<R>
Type Parameters:
R - The return type.
public class FluentResponseHeaderAssertion<R> extends org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentStringAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against ResponseHeader objects.

  • Constructor Details

    • FluentResponseHeaderAssertion

      public FluentResponseHeaderAssertion(org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.Assertion creator, ResponseHeader value, R returns)
      Chained constructor.

      Used when transforming one assertion into another so that the assertion config can be used by the new assertion.

      Parameters:
      creator - The assertion that created this assertion.
      Should be null if this is the top-level assertion.
      value - The object being tested.
      Can be null.
      returns - The object to return after a test method is called.
      If null, the test method returns this object allowing multiple test method calls to be used on the same assertion.

    • FluentResponseHeaderAssertion

      public FluentResponseHeaderAssertion(ResponseHeader value, R returns)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      value - The object being tested.
      Can be null.
      returns - The object to return after a test method is called.
      If null, the test method returns this object allowing multiple test method calls to be used on the same assertion.

  • Method Details

    • as

      public <T> org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentAnyAssertion<T,R> as(Class<T> type) throws RestCallException
      Converts the parameter value to a type using ResponseHeader.as(Class) and then returns the value as an any-object assertion.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The object type to create.
      Parameters:
      type - The object type to create.
      Returns:
      A new fluent assertion object.
      Throws:
      RestCallException - If value could not be parsed.

    • as

      public org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentAnyAssertion<Object,R> as(Type type, Type... args) throws RestCallException
      Converts the parameter value to a type using ResponseHeader.as(Type,Type...) and then returns the value as an any-object assertion.

      See Complex Data Types for information on defining complex generic types of Maps and Collections.

      Parameters:
      type - The object type to create.
      args - Optional type arguments.
      Returns:
      A new fluent assertion object.
      Throws:
      RestCallException - If value could not be parsed.

    • asBoolean

      public org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentBooleanAssertion<R> asBoolean()
      Converts this object assertion into a boolean assertion.
      Returns:
      A new assertion.
      Throws:
      AssertionError - If object is not a boolean.

    • asInteger

      public org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentIntegerAssertion<R> asInteger()
      Converts this object assertion into an integer assertion.
      Returns:
      A new assertion.
      Throws:
      AssertionError - If object is not an integer.

    • asJavaStrings

      public FluentResponseHeaderAssertion<R> asJavaStrings()
      Description copied from class: org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentStringAssertion
      When enabled, text in the message is converted to valid Java strings.

      value.replaceAll("\\\\", "\\\\\\\\").replaceAll("\n", "\\\\n").replaceAll("\t", "\\\\t");

      Overrides:
      asJavaStrings in class org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentStringAssertion<R>
      Returns:
      This object.

      Converts this object assertion into a long assertion.
      Returns:
      A new assertion.
      Throws:
      AssertionError - If object is not a long.

    • asZonedDateTime

      public org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentZonedDateTimeAssertion<R> asZonedDateTime()
      Converts this object assertion into a zoned-datetime assertion.
      Returns:
      A new assertion.
      Throws:
      AssertionError - If object is not a zoned-datetime.

    • setMsg

      public FluentResponseHeaderAssertion<R> setMsg(String msg, Object... args)
      Description copied from class: org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.Assertion
      Allows you to override the assertion failure message.

      String can contain "{msg}" to represent the original message.

      Example:

      import static org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.Assertions.*; // Throws an assertion with a custom message instead of the default "Value was null." assertString(myString) .setMsg("My string was bad: {msg}") .isNotNull();

      Overrides:
      setMsg in class org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentStringAssertion<R>
      Parameters:
      msg - The assertion failure message.
      args - Optional message arguments.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • setOut

      public FluentResponseHeaderAssertion<R> setOut(PrintStream value)
      Description copied from class: org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.Assertion
      If an error occurs, send the error message to the specified stream instead of STDERR.
      Overrides:
      setOut in class org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentStringAssertion<R>
      Parameters:
      value - The output stream. Can be null to suppress output.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • setSilent

      public FluentResponseHeaderAssertion<R> setSilent()
      Description copied from class: org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.Assertion
      Suppresses output to STDERR.

      This is the equivalent to calling out(null).

      Overrides:
      setSilent in class org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentStringAssertion<R>
      Returns:
      This object.

    • setStdOut

      public FluentResponseHeaderAssertion<R> setStdOut()
      Description copied from class: org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.Assertion
      If an error occurs, send the error message to STDOUT instead of STDERR.
      Overrides:
      setStdOut in class org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentStringAssertion<R>
      Returns:
      This object.

    • setThrowable

      public FluentResponseHeaderAssertion<R> setThrowable(Class<? extends RuntimeException> value)
      Description copied from class: org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.Assertion
      If an error occurs, throw this exception instead of the standard AssertionError.

      The throwable class must have a public constructor that takes in any of the following parameters:

      • Throwable - The caused-by exception (if there is one).
      • String - The assertion failure message.

      If the throwable cannot be instantiated, a RuntimeException is thrown instead.

      Example:

      import static org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.Assertions.*; // Throws a BadRequest instead of an AssertionError if the string is null. assertString(myString) .setThrowable(BadRequest.class) .isNotNull();

      Overrides:
      setThrowable in class org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentStringAssertion<R>
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      Returns:
      This object.
